title: 🚒 FireEquipment
description: Fire hoses, extinguishers and more to enhance firefighting gameplay !
body:
![FireEquipment Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70cfc5fa46a0ebf4037a219aff91e597d577c8ad.png)

Hi everyone ! FireEquipment allows you to extinguish fires with many items like a Fire Hose, an Extinguisher and a Pump to remove the water from the Fire Hose.

Need help ? Want to add a translation ? Or maybe a suggestion ?
> https://discord.gg/DkQSQa7

## Commands
- /firequip version : Shows the version of the plugin
- /firequip help : Show the help message
- /firequip reload: Reloads the config file
- /fequip <item> : Give you an item


<details>
<summary>Commands permissions</summary>

**/firequip <help/version>**
```
permission: firequip.info
```

**/fequip**
```
permission: firequip.tools.give
```

</details>

## Items
**Fire Hose**
Shoots a jet of water on 5 blocks in front of you (configurable).
```
permission: firequip.tools.hose
```
**Water Pump**
Vacuum water sources.
```
permission: firequip.tools.pump
```
**Extinguisher**
Extinguish flames in a short range (configurable).
```
permission: firequip.tools.extinguisher
```
